lastMessage: Added a "NOTES" panel to `orb/index.html`, stacked below the existing OPEN TASKS widget in the top-right corner. It polls the same `knowledge.json` already being fetched every 5s and lists note titles (currently: Jarvis-as-a-Service Launch, Jarvis-as-a-Service Pricing Research, Streamer HUD Widget Market Research, Streamer HUD Widget). Open `orb/index.html` in a browser to see it live.
